title: Thai Beef Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful Thai-inspired beef stir fry with caramelized onions.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the beef strips and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the beef from the skillet and set aside.
Add the sliced bell peppers and cook until tender, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the snow peas and cook until tender, about 1-2 minutes.
Return the beef to the skillet and pour in the Thai stir-fry sauce.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Stir in the caramelized onions and chopped fresh basil.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot over steamed rice or noodles.
